fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The store persists became_actionable_at and last_blocker_progress_at or equivalent indexed workflow facts without requiring per-query history scans. 2. Workflow facts update incrementally on ticket state changes and depends_on edge mutations across only the affected reverse-dependency slice. 3. Large graph queries use indexed workflow facts and graph adjacency rather than full-store rescans wherever practical. 4. Focused tests cover actionable transitions, blocker progress propagation, and index-backed query behavior.
fields.title: [ticket-api] Materialize recent-unblock and blocker-progress facts

fields.implementation_summary: Added indexed workflow facts for unresolved dependency counts, became_actionable_at, and last_blocker_progress_at using a dedicated workflow_facts table. TicketStore now recomputes affected reverse-dependency slices on ticket state transitions and depends_on edge mutations, exposes workflow facts to callers, adds targeted reverse-edge lookup support in the shared index, and rebuilds the facts during scan backfill.
fields.title: [ticket-api] Materialize recent-unblock and blocker-progress facts
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-23: cargo test -p ticket-api workflow_facts -- --nocapture passed after fixing local lifecycle and test issues, and cargo test -p ticket-api storage:: -- --nocapture passed for the broader storage slice covering scan, lifecycle, and workflow fact persistence.
